title: BelieveWebBrief
description: Structured brief produced by the believe-web interview v2. All string values must be ASCII when written to CMS tools; markdown fields allow extended chars only in user-visible text.

nombre.description: Display name of the brand, e.g. 'Pawers'.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier used as tenantSlug in CMS tools. Lowercase, hyphens only.

maasy_project_id.description: UUID from maasy_list_brands. Null when brand is not in Maasy yet.

industria.description: Short industry label, e.g. 'pet care', 'fintech', 'real estate'.

publico_objetivo.description: One-sentence description of the target audience.

propuesta_de_valor.description: Core value proposition in one sentence. ASCII only.

tagline.description: Brand tagline or slogan if the brand has one. E.g. 'Entrega que no falla.' ASCII only.

dna.description: Brand DNA consumed directly by cms_set_theme_from_dna and the copywriting engine.

colors.description: Brand color palette. primary and accent are REQUIRED. paper and ink default to #ffffff and #111111 if not provided; always confirm defaults with Jorge before proceeding.

primary.description: Main brand color as hex, e.g. '#0c3bb9'. Used in CTAs, header, key UI elements.

accent.description: Secondary or highlight color as hex. REQUIRED. If not provided, derive a complementary color and confirm with Jorge.

paper.description: Background / surface color as hex. Default #ffffff when omitted; confirm with Jorge.

ink.description: Main text color as hex. Default #111111 when omitted; confirm with Jorge.

fonts.description: Google Fonts names. Both display and body are REQUIRED.

display.description: Google Font name for headings, e.g. 'Fraunces' or 'Playfair Display'. REQUIRED.

body.description: Google Font name for body copy, e.g. 'Inter' or 'DM Sans'. REQUIRED. Default 'Inter' if brand has no preference.

tone.description: Brand voice tone used by copy blocks. ASCII only.

positioning.description: One-sentence brand positioning statement for CMS copy reference.

voice.description: Brand voice configuration for copywriting. cta_verb and register are REQUIRED.

cta_verb.description: Primary action verb for CTAs. E.g. 'reservar', 'agendar', 'calcular', 'ver', 'empezar'. REQUIRED.

register.description: Grammatical register for copy. 'tu' for informal (most brands), 'usted' for formal (health, legal, finance). REQUIRED.

key_messages.description: Up to 5 key messages that must appear across the site copy.

palabras_propias.description: Brand-specific vocabulary: product names, coined terms, taglines. E.g. 'SLA garantizado', 'metricas auditables'.

palabras_prohibidas.description: Words or phrases the brand never uses. E.g. 'innovador', 'soluciones integrales'. The skill adds a base list on top of these.

copy.description: Copywriting DNA. All 6 core fields required for world-class copy. If missing, skill stops and interviews before generating copy.

cliente_ideal.description: Specific ICP: who they are, their role, company size or context. E.g. 'DTC founders running 500+ orders/month on Shopify, no in-house logistics team'.

pain_principal.description: The ONE pain that makes the ICP lose sleep. Must be specific and emotional, not generic.

transformacion.description: Before/after transformation the brand delivers. Format: '[before state] to [after state]'.

objeciones.description: Top 3-5 objections prospects raise before buying. Each is a short phrase from the prospect's POV. REQUIRED, minimum 3.

competidores.description: 2-4 real alternatives the ICP considers. Used for differentiation only, never named in copy. REQUIRED, minimum 2.

diferenciador_real.description: The one thing this brand does that no competitor does the same way. Must be concrete and defensible.

prueba_social.description: 2-5 specific proof points: real stats, client names (with permission), awards, or before/after numbers. No vague claims. If none exist, set to empty array and note in brief.notas.

valor.description: The proof point verbatim. E.g. '99.3% order accuracy' or 'Cut return rate by 40% in 90 days - Mara G., Founder at Nutria'.

palabras_prohibidas.description: Brand-specific forbidden words (in addition to the base list the skill always applies).

palabras_propias.description: Brand-specific vocabulary that must appear in copy.

custom_css.description: Optional raw CSS overrides for brands that need component-level customization beyond color/font tokens. WARNING: not sanitized; use only with trusted input. Max 2000 chars.

assets.description: Visual asset URLs for the brand. All optional but logged as missing in gate checks. logo_url or logo_fallback must be set.

logo_url.description: URL to the brand logo (PNG or SVG preferred). If not available, set logo_fallback to 'wordmark'.

logo_fallback.description: What to use when logo_url is not available. 'wordmark' means use brand name as text in header.

favicon_url.description: URL to favicon (ICO, PNG 32x32 or SVG).

hero_image_url.description: URL to the main hero image for the homepage. If not available, set hero_fallback.

hero_fallback.description: What to use when hero_image_url is not available. E.g. 'color-primary' for solid primary color background, or a description for generative image.

product_images.description: URLs to product or service photos for gallery and split-content blocks.

video_url.description: YouTube or Vimeo URL for product/brand video. If null, video-embed block is excluded from composition.

og_image_url.description: URL to Open Graph image for social sharing (1200x630px recommended).

visual_reference_url.description: Optional URL to a Figma file, competitor website, or moodboard for design reference.

objetivo.description: Primary website goal. Drives composition-playbook recipe selection.

locale.description: Language/locale for copy generation. Default 'es'. 'es-en' means bilingual site.

dominio.description: Target custom domain without protocol, e.g. 'pawers.com'. Null = use sslip.io staging URL.

seo.description: Global SEO metadata for the site.

site_title.description: Site-wide title tag, e.g. 'Pawers - Fulfillment DTC Garantizado'. Max 60 chars.

meta_description.description: Global meta description for the homepage and fallback for other pages. Max 160 chars.

og_image_url.description: Default OG image URL. Falls back to assets.og_image_url if not set.

social.description: Social media handles for footer social links. Keys are platform names, values are handles (with or without @) or full profile URLs.

linkedin.description: LinkedIn company page handle or URL.

x.description: X (formerly Twitter) handle or profile URL.

provider.description: Analytics provider. 'openpanel' is the Believe stack default (analytics.believe-global.com). 'none' to skip.

tracking_id.description: Tracking ID or measurement ID for the analytics provider. Not required when provider is 'none'.

pages.description: Ordered list of pages to create. Must include at least one page with slug 'home'.

slug.description: URL slug for the page. Use 'home' for the root page.

title.description: Human-readable page title shown in CMS nav.

sections.description: Ordered blocks that compose the page. Maps to cms_create_page blocks array.

items.description: additionalProperties: true allows copy fields (heading, subheading, items, etc.) passed verbatim to CMS.

templateId.description: Exact templateId from catalog, confirmed via cms_list_block_templates. E.g. 'hero.cover-image-ctas'. NEVER invented.

intent.description: Why this block exists on this page. Used for copy generation context.

copy.description: Generated and validated copy for this block. Fields vary by blockType (heading, subheading, items, cta_text, etc.). Populated by Paso 3B and validated by 3B.8 checklist.

backend.description: Intended lead destination. 'maasy' stores in Maasy CRM; 'appwrite' stores in the brand's Appwrite project. The tool may override this based on available credentials.

actual_backend.description: Actual sink used after cms_provision_leads runs. Populated post-execution. May differ from backend if credentials were not available.

email_provider.description: Transactional email for lead notifications. Passed as email param to cms_provision_leads.

notification_email.description: Email address that receives new lead notifications.

confirmado.description: Set to true ONLY after Jorge has reviewed the brief summary in Paso 3E and said OK explicitly. Gates all dryRun:false calls.

notas.description: Free-text notes from the interview and gate checklists. Includes: copy quality checklist results (3B.8), excluded blocks (stats without data, video-embed without video), placeholder markers. Not passed to CMS tools.
